name: Holiday Family Gathering
description: Keep this one tucked in your pocket. Warm-hearted, lightly sarcastic.
title: B · I · N · G · O
subtitle: You know these people — first to five in a row wins!
items: Someone asks about school or work
A relative falls asleep on the couch
Traffic on the way in becomes a topic
An enthusiastic hug from an aunt or uncle
Kids running in and out of the house
A dog getting too many table scraps
The same story told again (and again)
A political comment quickly changed
Someone on their phone at the table
A dish that got a little too browned
A dish that no one touches
Leftovers being divided up
'Who made this?' asked hopefully
A kid at the dedicated 'kids table'
An adult stuck at the kids table
A group photo where no one's ready
A pet wearing something festive
Someone asleep before 9 PM
A cousin you don't remember meeting
A board game causing a mild debate
Someone crying at a movie on TV
A completely full dishwasher
A second round of dessert
'When's the game on?'
An unsolicited home-project tour
A baby being passed around the room
A 'remember when' story
A kitchen too crowded to move in
Someone asking about a partner ex
A host looking visibly stressed
A compliment that's also a question
A leftover-container negotiation
The 30-minute goodbye in the driveway
An heirloom dish making an appearance
Music nobody picked playing anyway
